controls.control_objective: To ensure supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, the reserve bank of india (frauds - classification and reporting by commercial banks and sele
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall
supersede the earlier Directions on the subject, namely, the Reserve Bank of India
(Frauds - Classification and Reporting by commercial banks and select FIs) Directions
2016 (Ref.DBS.CO.CFMC.BC.No.1/23.04.001/2016-17) dated July 01, 2016
(Updated as on July 03, 2017).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, the reserve bank of india (frauds - classification and reporting by commercial banks and sele

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in commercial banks (including regional rural banks) and all india financial institutions)
controls.control_description:
1.1 Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management
in Commercial Banks (including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial
Institutions) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in commercial banks (including regional rural banks) and all india financial institutions)

controls.control_objective: To ensure hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'banks' for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
1.2.3 The Commercial Banks and AIFIs shall hereinafter collectively be referred
to as 'banks' for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'banks' for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a board3 approved policy4 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the
controls.control_description:
2.1.1 There shall be a Board3 approved Policy4 on fraud risk management
delineating roles and responsibilities of Board / Board Committees and Senior
Management of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a board3 approved policy4 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also incorporate measures for ensuring compliance with principles of natural justice5 in a time-bound manner which at a minimum shall include:
controls.control_description:
The Policy shall also incorporate measures for
ensuring compliance with principles of natural justice5 in a time-bound manner
which at a minimum shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also incorporate measures for ensuring compliance with principles of natural justice5 in a time-bound manner which at a minimum shall include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi
controls.control_description:
The SCN
shall provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis
which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn
controls.control_description:
2.1.1.2 A reasonable time of not less than 21 days shall be provided to
the Persons / Entities on whom the SCN was served to respond to the
said SCN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the incidents of fraud to nabard as hitherto
controls.control_description: 2 RRBs shall report the incidents of fraud to NABARD as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the incidents of fraud to nabard as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description: 4 The policy shall inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc
controls.control_description: and connected matters, read with the Order dated May 12, 2023 passed by the Hon'ble Supreme Court in Misc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to

controls.control_objective: To ensure take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions
controls.control_description: 7 As non-whole-time directors (like nominee directors and independent directors) are normally not in charge of, or responsible to the company for the conduct of business of the company, banks may take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons / entities prior to declaring such
controls.control_description:
Banks shall have a well laid out system for issuance of SCN and
examination of the responses / submissions made by the Persons /
Entities prior to declaring such Persons / Entities as fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons / entities prior to declaring such

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the bank regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or otherwise
controls.control_description:
2.1.1.4 A reasoned Order shall be served on the Persons / Entities
conveying the decision of the bank regarding declaration / classification
of the account as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the bank regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, the submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise
controls.control_description:
Such Order(s) must contain
relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, the submission made against
the SCN and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, the submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 The Fraud Risk Management Policy shall be reviewed by the Board at
least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the
Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min
controls.control_description:
2.1.3.1 Banks shall constitute a Committee of the Board to be known as
'Special Committee of the Board for Monitoring and Follow-up of cases
of Frauds' (SCBMF) with a minimum of three members of the Board,
consisting of a whole-time director and a minimum of two independent
directors / non-executive directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min

controls.control_objective: To ensure be headed by one of the independent directors / non-executive directors
controls.control_description:
The Committee shall be headed by
one of the independent directors / non-executive directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be headed by one of the independent directors / non-executive directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the bank
controls.control_description:
2.1.3.2 SCBMF shall oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk
management in the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk manag
controls.control_description:
SCBMF shall review and monitor cases of
frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures
for strengthening the internal controls, risk management framework and
minimising the incidence of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk manag

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the board of the bank
controls.control_description:
The coverage8 and periodicity of
such reviews shall be decided by the Board of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the board of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the bank
controls.control_description:
2.1.4 The Senior Management shall be responsible for implementation of the
fraud risk management policy approved by the Board of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the bank
controls.control_description:
A periodic
review of incidents of fraud shall also be placed before Board / Audit Committee
of Board (ACB), as appropriate, by the Senior Management of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau
controls.control_description: 8 The coverage may include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frauds and delay in examination/conclusion of staff accountability, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in account(s) are examin
controls.control_description:
2.1.5 Banks shall put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that Whistle
Blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in account(s)
are examined and concluded appropriately under their Whistle Blower Policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in account(s) are examin

controls.control_objective: To ensure set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management9 within their overall risk management functions / dep
controls.control_description:
2.2 Banks shall set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of
fraud risk management9 within their overall risk management functions / Department.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management9 within their overall risk management functions / dep

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description:
A senior official in the rank of at least a General Manager or equivalent shall be
responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a framework for early warning signals (ews) and red flagging of accounts (rfa) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the boa
controls.control_description:
3.1.1 Banks shall have a framework for Early Warning Signals (EWS) and Red
Flagging of Accounts (RFA) under the overall Fraud Risk Management Policy
approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a framework for early warning signals (ews) and red flagging of accounts (rfa) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the boa

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews and rfa
controls.control_description:
3.1.2 The Risk Management Committee of the Board (RMCB) shall oversee the
effectiveness of the framework for EWS and RFA.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews and rfa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews and rfa within the bank
controls.control_description:
The Senior Management
shall be responsible for implementation of a robust Framework for EWS and
RFA within the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews and rfa within the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the rmcb
controls.control_description:
3.1.3 The EWS indicators identified for monitoring credit facilities / loan
accounts and other banking transactions shall be approved by the RMCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the rmcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed by the rmcb
controls.control_description:
Appropriate Turnaround Time (TAT), preferably not more than 30 days, for
examination of EWS alerts / triggers shall be prescribed by the RMCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed by the rmcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the status of red flagged accounts, including the ews alerts / triggers, remedial actions initiated by the bank, etc
controls.control_description:
3.1.4 RMCB shall review the status of red flagged accounts, including the EWS
alerts / triggers, remedial actions initiated by the bank, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the status of red flagged accounts, including the ews alerts / triggers, remedial actions initiated by the bank, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of rmcb so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consistency of the outcomes
controls.control_description:
3.1.5 The EWS / RFA framework shall be subject to suitable validation in
accordance with the directions of RMCB so as to ensure its integrity, robustness
and consistency of the outcomes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of rmcb so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consistency of the outcomes

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for, among others:
controls.control_description: 3.2 The EWS / RFA Framework shall provide for, among others:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for, among others:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective
controls.control_description:
3.3.1 Development of EWS System: The EWS system shall be comprehensive
and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make
the framework robust and effective.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure illustratively capture could be based on the transactional data of accounts, financial performance of borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of the b
controls.control_description:
The broad indicators which the EWS
system may illustratively capture could be based on the transactional data of
accounts, financial performance of borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of
the borrowers, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to illustratively capture could be based on the transactional data of accounts, financial performance of borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a dedicated data analytics and mi unit keeping in view their size, complexity, business mix, risk profile, etc
controls.control_description:
3.3.2 Data Analytics and Market Intelligence (MI) Unit: Banks shall set up a
dedicated Data Analytics and MI Unit keeping in view their size, complexity,
business mix, risk profile, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up a dedicated data analytics and mi unit keeping in view their size, complexity, business mix, risk profile, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate collection and processing of relevant information to enable an early detection and prevention of potentially fraudulent activities
controls.control_description:
Such Unit shall facilitate collection and
processing of relevant information to enable an early detection and prevention
of potentially fraudulent activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate collection and processing of relevant information to enable an early detection and prevention of potentially fraudulent activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessitate examination whether the account needs to be red flagged and consequently, investigation from potential fraud angle
controls.control_description:
3.3.3 Generation of EWS alert(s) / trigger(s) shall necessitate examination
whether the account needs to be red flagged and consequently, investigation
from potential fraud angle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessitate examination whether the account needs to be red flagged and consequently, investigation from potential fraud angle

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the reserve bank within seven days of being red flagged
controls.control_description:
3.3.4 An account meeting the CRILC reporting threshold11 by the reporting
entity, once red flagged, shall be reported to the Reserve Bank within seven
days of being red flagged.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the reserve bank within seven days of being red flagged

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other banking / no
controls.control_description:
3.4.1 Banks shall develop / strengthen their EWS system by identifying suitable
indicators and parameterising them in their EWS system for monitoring other
banking / non-credit related transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other banking / no

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other banking / non-credit related transactions effi
controls.control_description:
Banks shall strive to continuously
upgrade the EWS system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor
other banking / non-credit related transactions efficiently and prevent fraudulent
activities through the banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other banking / non-credit related transactions effi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tested periodically
controls.control_description:
Further, the effectiveness of EWS
system shall be tested periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tested periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction monitori
controls.control_description:
3.4.2 The design and specification of EWS system shall be robust and resilient
to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and financial data of
customers are secure and transaction monitoring for prevention / detection of
potential fraud is on real-time basis13.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction monitori

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc
controls.control_description:
Banks shall remain vigilant in monitoring
transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-KYC compliant and
money mule accounts etc., to contain unauthorised / fraudulent transactions
and to prevent misuse of banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure extensively monitor and analyse other banking / non-credit related transactions, more specifically the transactions through digital platforms and appl
controls.control_description:
3.4.3 The Data Analytics & MI Unit or other dedicated analytics set up in banks
shall extensively monitor and analyse other banking / non-credit related
transactions, more specifically the transactions through digital platforms and
applications, in order to identify unusual patterns and activities which could alert
the bank timely in initiating appropriate measures towards prevention of
fraudulent activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extensively monitor and analyse other banking / non-credit related transactions, more specifically the transactions through digital platforms and appl

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions
controls.control_description:
3.5 Banks shall put in place / suitably upgrade their existing EWS system within six
months from the date of issuance of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure use an external audit14 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy, for further investigation in such accounts
controls.control_description:
4.1 In case of a credit facility / loan account classified as red-flagged account, banks
shall use an external audit14 or an internal audit as per their Board approved Policy,
for further investigation in such accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to use an external audit14 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy, for further investigation in such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others
controls.control_description:
4.1.1 Banks shall frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering
aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors,
among others.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the bank within a specified time limi
controls.control_description:
Further, the contractual agreement with the auditors shall, inter
alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and
submission of audit report to the bank within a specified time limit, as approved
by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the bank within a specified time limi

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s) consequent upon red flagging of the account
controls.control_description:
4.1.2 The loan agreement with the borrower shall contain clauses for conduct
of such audit at the behest of lender(s) consequent upon red flagging of the
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s) consequent upon red flagging of the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses
controls.control_description:
In cases where the audit report submitted remains inconclusive or is
delayed due to non-cooperation by the borrower, banks shall conclude on
status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available
on their record and their own internal investigation / assessment in such
cases15.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the individual bank level and such bank(s) shall report the status of the account on the reserve bank's crilc platform16 immediately (not later
controls.control_description:
4.1.3 The decision to classify any account, either standard or NPA, as a red-
flagged account shall be at the individual bank level and such bank(s) shall
report the status of the account on the Reserve Bank's CRILC platform16
immediately (not later than seven days from date of classification as red-flagged
account).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be at the individual bank level and such bank(s) shall report the status of the account on the reserve bank's crilc platform16 immediately (not later

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the principles of natural justice17 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud
controls.control_description:
4.1.4 The bank (in case of sole lending) or the individual banks (in case of
multiple banking arrangement or consortium lending) shall ensure that the
principles of natural justice17 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring
an account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the principles of natural justice17 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be completed within 180 days from the date of first reporting of the account as red- flagged on the crilc platform
controls.control_description:
4.1.5 Once an account has been red-flagged, the entire process of classification
of the account as fraud or removal of red-flagged status shall ordinarily be
completed within 180 days from the date of first reporting of the account as red-
flagged on the CRILC platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be completed within 180 days from the date of first reporting of the account as red- flagged on the crilc platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description:
Cases remaining in red-flagged status beyond
15 Banks shall ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (Please refer to Para 2.1.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure 22, 2014)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 22, 2014)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to (Please refer to Para 2.1.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the scbmf for review with adequate reasoning / justification thereof
controls.control_description:
180 days shall be reported to the SCBMF for review with adequate reasoning /
justification thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the scbmf for review with adequate reasoning / justification thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to supervisory review by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Such cases shall also be subject to supervisory review by
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to supervisory review by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subjected to examination by banks concerned from fraud angle under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.1.6 In case an account is identified as a fraud by any bank, the borrowal
accounts of other group companies18, in which one or more promoter(s) /
whole-time director(s) are common, shall also be subjected to examination by
banks concerned from fraud angle under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subjected to examination by banks concerned from fraud angle under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately red-flag the account and follow the usual process for classification of account as fraud and complete the same within the stipulated perio
controls.control_description:
4.1.7 In cases where Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs) have suo moto
initiated investigation involving a borrower account, bank/s shall immediately
red-flag the account and follow the usual process for classification of account
as fraud and complete the same within the stipulated period as specified at
Para 4.1.5 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately red-flag the account and follow the usual process for classification of account as fraud and complete the same within the stipulated perio

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful
controls.control_description:
Therefore, banks may
incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party
service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful negligence
/ malpractice by them is found to be a causative factor for fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after complying with the principles of natural justice, report to indian banks' association (iba) the details of such third parties or professionals
controls.control_description:
4.2.2 Banks shall, after complying with the principles of natural justice, report
to Indian Banks' Association (IBA) the details of such third parties or
professionals involved in frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , after complying with the principles of natural justice, report to indian banks' association (iba) the details of such third parties or professionals

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy
controls.control_description:
4.3.1 Banks shall initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability
in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal
policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct examination of staff accountability as per the guidelines issued by the central vigilance commission (cvc)
controls.control_description:
PSBs and AIFIs shall conduct examination of staff accountability as per
the guidelines issued by the Central Vigilance Commission (CVC).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to conduct examination of staff accountability as per the guidelines issued by the central vigilance commission (cvc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also refer all fraud cases of amount involving ₹3 crore and above for examining the role of all levels of officials / whole-time directors (including
controls.control_description:
CVC Order, PSBs and AIFIs shall also refer all fraud cases of amount involving
₹3 crore and above for examining the role of all levels of officials / whole-time
directors (including ex-officials / ex-WTDs) to the Advisory Board for Banking
and Financial Frauds (ABBFF)19 constituted by the CVC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also refer all fraud cases of amount involving ₹3 crore and above for examining the role of all levels of officials / whole-time directors (including

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate examination of their accountability and place it before the board
controls.control_description:
4.3.3 In cases involving very senior executives of the bank (MD & CEO /
Executive Director / Executives of equivalent rank)20, the ACB shall initiate
examination of their accountability and place it before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate examination of their accountability and place it before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be referred to the abbff
controls.control_description:
However, in
case of PSBs and AIFIs, such cases shall also be referred to the ABBFF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be referred to the abbff

controls.control_objective: To ensure be debarred from raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial entities regulated by rbi, for a period of five years f
controls.control_description:
4.4.1 Persons / Entities classified and reported as fraud by banks and also
Entities and Persons associated21 with such Entities, shall be debarred from
raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial entities
regulated by RBI, for a period of five years from the date of full repayment of
the defrauded amount / settlement amount agreed upon in case of a
compromise settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be debarred from raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial entities regulated by rbi, for a period of five years f

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory cooling period as mentioned at
controls.control_description:
4.4.2 Lending to such Persons / Entities, being commercial decisions, the
lending banks shall have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such
requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory cooling period as
mentioned at Para 4.4.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory cooling period as mentioned at

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after implementation of 19 ple
controls.control_description:
4.5.1 In case an entity classified as fraud has subsequently undergone a
resolution either under IBC or under the resolution framework of RBI22 resulting
in a change in the management and control of the entity / business enterprise,
the bank shall examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as
fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after implementation of
19 Please refer to the Vigilance Manual issued by Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), CVC Office Order No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after implementation of 19 ple

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered
controls.control_description: 20 Such executive shall not participate in the meeting of the Board / ACB / SCBMF in which their accountability is to be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be associated
controls.control_description: (b) in case of a natural person, all entities in which she / he is associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework
controls.control_description:
4.5.2 The penal measures as detailed in Para 4.4 shall not be applicable to
entities / business enterprises after implementation of the Resolution Plan
under IBC or aforesaid prudential framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s) / director(s) / persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the ent
controls.control_description:
4.5.3 The penal measures detailed in Para 4.4 shall continue to apply to the
erstwhile promoter(s) / director(s) / persons who were in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity / business enterprise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s) / director(s) / persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the ent

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report the incidents of fraud to leas
controls.control_description:
5.1 Banks shall immediately report the incidents of fraud to LEAs, subject to applicable
laws, as indicated below24:
Category of
Amount involved
LEA to whom complaint
Remarks
bank
in the fraud
should be lodged
Private Sector / Foreign Banks
Below ₹1 crore
State / Union Territory (UT) Police
Details of fraud are to be reported to SFIO in Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) format.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report the incidents of fraud to leas

controls.control_objective: To ensure file separate complaints
controls.control_description: 24 In case of consortium lending, each of the consortium member may file separate complaints, if separate offences have been committed in respect of each of them and if the fraud so committed is not part of the same fraudulent act / transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file separate complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure file a complaint and all the other members may extend necessary support to the said member and the leas in investigation of the fraud, including by wa
controls.control_description: In other cases of such lending, only one member may file a complaint and all the other members may extend necessary support to the said member and the LEAs in investigation of the fraud, including by way of providing all necessary information, documents etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file a complaint and all the other members may extend necessary support to the said member and the leas in investigation of the fraud, including by wa

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a decision in this regard depending on the facts and circumstances that may be relevant in a given case and the applicable laws
controls.control_description: Banks may take a decision in this regard depending on the facts and circumstances that may be relevant in a given case and the applicable laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a decision in this regard depending on the facts and circumstances that may be relevant in a given case and the applicable laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements
controls.control_description:
5.2 Banks shall establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting
incidents of fraud to LEAs and for proper coordination to meet the requirements of the
LEAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.control_description:
6.1 Reporting of Incidents of Fraud to Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
To ensure uniformity and consistency while reporting incidents of fraud to RBI through
Fraud Monitoring Returns (FMRs) using online portal, banks shall choose the most
appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place systems and procedures to ensure that the information available in central fraud registry (cfr) is used for credit risk and fraud risk ma
controls.control_description:
6.2.1 Banks shall put in place systems and procedures to ensure that the
information available in Central Fraud Registry (CFR) is used for credit risk and
fraud risk management effectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place systems and procedures to ensure that the information available in central fraud registry (cfr) is used for credit risk and fraud risk ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure report incidents of fraud to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard
controls.control_description: They shall report incidents of fraud to NABARD in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report incidents of fraud to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report payment system related disputed / suspected or attempted fraudulent transactions to central payments fraud information registry (cpfir)28, m
controls.control_description:
6.2.2 Banks are required to report payment system related disputed / suspected
or attempted fraudulent transactions to Central Payments Fraud Information
Registry (CPFIR)28, maintained by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report payment system related disputed / suspected or attempted fraudulent transactions to central payments fraud information registry (cpfir)28, m

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably be reported through fmr so as to be reflected in cfr
controls.control_description:
However, such transactions, if
subsequently concluded as fraud committed on bank(s), shall invariably be
reported through FMR so as to be reflected in CFR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably be reported through fmr so as to be reflected in cfr

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish fmr29 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately, but not later than 14 days from the date of classification3
controls.control_description:
6.3.1 Banks shall furnish FMR29 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the
amount involved, immediately, but not later than 14 days from the date of
classification30 of an incident / account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish fmr29 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately, but not later than 14 days from the date of classification3

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to the concerned overseas leas in accordance with the relevant laws / regulations of the host countries
controls.control_description:
6.3.2 Incidents of fraud at overseas branches of Indian banks shall also be
reported to the concerned overseas LEAs in accordance with the relevant laws
/ regulations of the host countries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to the concerned overseas leas in accordance with the relevant laws / regulations of the host countries

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report frauds perpetrated in their group entities31 to rbi separately32
controls.control_description:
6.3.3 Banks shall also report frauds perpetrated in their group entities31 to RBI
separately32, if such entities are not regulated / supervised by any financial
sector regulatory / supervisory authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report frauds perpetrated in their group entities31 to rbi separately32

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report incidents of fraud to rbi
controls.control_description:
However, in case of overseas banking
group entity of Indian banks, the parent bank shall also report incidents of fraud
to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report incidents of fraud to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi34
controls.control_description:
6.3.4 Banks shall adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these Master Directions
for reporting of fraud cases to RBI34.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi34

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine and fix staff accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting to rbi
controls.control_description:
Banks shall examine and fix staff
accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine and fix staff accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr
controls.control_description:
6.3.5 While reporting frauds, banks shall ensure that persons / entities who /
which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr
controls.control_description:
6.3.6 Banks may, under exceptional circumstances, withdraw FMR / remove
name(s) of perpetrator(s) from FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, 28 as required in terms of circular ref
controls.control_description:
Such withdrawal / removal shall, however,
28 As required in terms of Circular Ref.CO.DPSS.OVRST.No.S1619/06-08-005/2022-23 dated December 26, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, 28 as required in terms of circular ref

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided through fmr update application (fua)
controls.control_description: 29 Updates to the FMR shall be provided through FMR Update Application (FUA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided through fmr update application (fua)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished through e-mail (doscofrmc@rbi
controls.control_description: 32 However, the FMR shall be furnished through e-mail (doscofrmc@rbi.org.in) only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished through e-mail (doscofrmc@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:
controls.control_description:
6.4.1 Banks shall close fraud cases using 'Closure Module' where the actions
as stated below are complete:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors
controls.control_description:
6.4.3 In all closure cases of reported frauds, banks shall maintain details of
such cases for examination by auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the presenting banker
controls.control_description:
7.1 To ensure uniformity and avoid duplication, reporting of frauds involving forged
instruments, including fake / forged instruments sent in clearing in respect of truncated
instruments, shall continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the presenting
banker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the presenting banker

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately handover the underlying instrument to the drawee / paying bank, as and when demanded, to enable them to inform leas for investigation and
controls.control_description:
In such cases the presenting bank shall immediately handover the underlying
instrument to the drawee / paying bank, as and when demanded, to enable them to
inform LEAs for investigation and further action under law and to report the fraud to
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately handover the underlying instrument to the drawee / paying bank, as and when demanded, to enable them to inform leas for investigation and

controls.control_objective: To ensure file the fraud report with the rbi and inform the leas for investigation and further action under law
controls.control_description:
has been credited before realisation and subsequently the instrument is found to be
fake / forged and returned by the paying bank, the presenting bank which is defrauded
or is put to loss by paying the amount before realisation of the instrument shall file the
fraud report with the RBI and inform the LEAs for investigation and further action under
law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file the fraud report with the rbi and inform the leas for investigation and further action under law

controls.control_objective: To ensure subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-ver
controls.control_description:
8.1 Legal Audit of Title Documents in respect of Large Value Loan Accounts
Banks shall subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all
credit facilities of ₹5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-verification, till the
loan is fully repaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹5 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-ver

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2
controls.control_description:
The scope and periodicity of legal audit shall be in accordance with
the Board approved policy referred to in clause 2.1.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be ₹1 crore
controls.control_description:
Specific to Small Finance
Banks, Local Area Banks and Regional Rural Banks, the threshold amount for periodic
legal audit of title deeds and other related title documents shall continue to be ₹1 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be ₹1 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs
controls.control_description:
8.2 Treatment of Accounts classified as Fraud and sold to other Lenders / Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs)37
Banks shall complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan
account / credit facility to other lenders / ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure report it to rbi / nabard38 before selling the accounts to other lenders / arcs39
controls.control_description:
In cases where banks conclude that a
fraud has been perpetrated in the account, they shall report it to RBI / NABARD38
before selling the accounts to other lenders / ARCs39.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report it to rbi / nabard38 before selling the accounts to other lenders / arcs39

controls.control_objective: To ensure come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account
controls.control_description:
8.3.1 During the course of the audit, auditors may come across instances where
the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of
fraudulent transactions in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the bank for appropriate ac
controls.control_description:
In such a situation, the auditor should
immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to
the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of the bank for appropriate action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the bank for appropriate ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and 37 reference is invited to master d
controls.control_description:
8.3.2 Internal Audit in banks shall cover controls and processes involved in
prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and
37 Reference is invited to Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Transfer of Loan Exposures) Directions, 2021 (ref:DOR.STR.REC.51/21.04.048/2021-22 dated September 24, 2021) as updated from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and 37 reference is invited to master d

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to nabard
controls.control_description: 38 RRBs shall report to NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nabard, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs
controls.control_description: 39 In cases where accounts are sold to ARCs, banks shall continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to RBI / NABARD, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nabard, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the bank
controls.control_description:
8.4.2 The 'date of detection' to be reported in FMR is the actual date when the
fraud came to light in the concerned branch / audit / department, as the case
may be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report42 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce
controls.control_description:
9.1 Banks shall report42 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including
attempted cases), to Fraud Monitoring Group (FMG), Department of Supervision,
Central Office, Reserve Bank of India, immediately (not later than seven days) from
their occurrence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to report42 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter
controls.control_description:
9.2 Banks shall also submit a quarterly Return (RBR) on theft, burglary, dacoity and
robbery to RBI using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates
controls.control_description:
This
shall be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates

controls.control_objective: To ensure report cases of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard
controls.control_description: They shall report cases of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to NABARD in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report cases of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under these directions
controls.control_description:
instructions / guidelines contained in these Circulars shall be deemed as given under
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under these directions
